title: Foundation Models for Computational Pathology
subtitle: Featured thesis project
description: Benchmarking and evaluation pipeline for histopathology foundation models, combining whole-slide image representations and pathology report embeddings for cross-modal retrieval tasks.
details: Curated public export of the TFM pipeline with privacy-safe figures, synthetic examples and documentation for multimodal retrieval benchmarking in computational pathology.

title: VoxelMorph for Breast MRI Registration
subtitle: Public bachelor thesis project
description: Public GitHub repository for a breast MRI registration project based on VoxelMorph.
details: Established bachelor-thesis project already available on GitHub; this portfolio highlights it as a strong medical-imaging project and keeps local support notes separate.

title: Machine Learning for Classification and Regression
subtitle: Coursework portfolio
description: Selected supervised-learning coursework focused on classification, regression and evaluation workflows.
details: Curated RMarkdown material with safe visual outputs and a public-facing README centered on model comparison, validation strategy and metric interpretation.

title: Neural Networks and Simulation
subtitle: Deep-learning coursework
description: Neural-network and simulation coursework staged for future public cleanup.
details: Repository scaffold prepared; the main notebook still requires path cleaning, export reduction and a cleaner narrative before publication.

title: Multivariate Analysis and Process Monitoring
subtitle: PCA / MCA / PLS-DA portfolio
description: Curated material on multivariate analysis, class modelling and process-monitoring style visualizations.
details: Combines two separate academic source folders: exploratory multivariate analysis plus a dedicated multivariate process-monitoring project with correlation and PLS-DA diagnostic figures.

title: Production Planning and Parallel Machine Scheduling
subtitle: Engineering optimization project
description: Selected optimization coursework covering release dates, setups and production-planning logic.
details: Kept as a secondary engineering project in the portfolio; the public scaffold is ready, but the main notebooks still need local-path cleanup before publication.
